title: Wilson College honors distinguished alumni returning to campus
summary_en: The Wilson College of Business at the University of Northern Iowa is proud to announce the selection of several distinguished graduates to participate in the prestigious Alumni in Residence program.
title_cn: 威尔逊学院表彰返校杰出校友

title: For the love of movement
summary_en: When you have a passion for movement and enjoy working with kids, becoming a physical education teacher is a dream job. That’s the case for PE teacher and UNI alum Caitlin Schoville and UNI PE major Peyton Major.

title: Passionate about mental health? Here are some top career options!
summary_en: From a therapist to a psychiatric nurse, here are a few top mental health careers that will allow you to help others in a meaningful way.
title_cn: 有志于投身心理健康领域？以下为热门职业选择

title: UNI expands cybersecurity, business and engineering programs with new online and hybrid offerings
summary_en: UNI is expanding several high‑demand programs by adding new online and hybrid options, including the Business Teaching BA, Cybersecurity & System Administration BS and the Applied Engineering: Applied Systems Engineering Management MS. These flexible pathways give working and place‑bound students greater access to UNI’s high‑quality instruction.
title_cn: 北爱荷华大学新增线上及混合授课项目 扩充网络安全、商科与工程类专业设置
